lever: decode tensor buffers through dtype-specialized fixed-width paths instead of re-entering the scalar byte decoder for every element

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-profile-pass16 cargo bench -p fj-ffi --bench ffi_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-rebench-pass16-final cargo bench -p fj-ffi --bench ffi_baseline -- marshal/1k_buffer_to_tensor --sample-size 60 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3
after.note: A prior post-change run on the same worker measured 0.78026 us mean before the UBS-directed direct-index cleanup; final kept number is the conservative 0.91168 us mean.

delta.comparison_note: Baseline and final re-bench used different rch workers; the delta is large enough to score despite cross-worker noise.

golden.case: F64 tensor bytes for [-0.0 bits, quiet NaN payload bits, 3.5 bits] restore to matching Literal::F64Bits in input order.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: The tensor branch still iterates chunks_exact over the input byte slice from left to right; output element order is input chunk order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No lookup, sorting, registry, or dispatch tie-breaking paths are changed.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Unmarshalling still performs native-endian bit reconstruction only; no arithmetic, normalization, NaN canonicalization, or signed-zero change is introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or stochastic primitive paths are touched.
isomorphism_proof.bool_validation: buffer_to_value still calls validate_buffer_contents before dtype-specialized decoding, so noncanonical bool bytes fail with the same public error before any bool element construction.

validation.note: exit 0; no critical findings, existing test unwrap/assert warning inventory remains

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-check-pass16 cargo check -p fj-ffi --all-targets
